dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped moving average ± 2*StdDev bands to Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower) which use identical calculation (SMA ± 2*StdDev by default with 20-period settings). Entry requires breach with prior bar confirmation. Exit on reversal breach. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal generates both long and short signals based on which band is breached.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped moving average ± 2*StdDev bands to Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_middle, bb_lower) which use identical calculation (SMA ± 2*StdDev by default with 20-period settings). Entry requires breach with prior bar confirmation. Exit on reversal breach. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal generates both long and short signals based on which band is breached.

source_rule_text: Generate buy signals when price breaches an upper threshold band surrounding a moving average, and generate sell signals when price breaches a lower threshold band, using either fixed percentage offsets or volatility-adjusted bands.
